purpose: High-fashion editorial showcasing abaya, hijab, or modest modest wear. Face optional — silhouette and fabric drape are primary. Saudi modest fashion aesthetic.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: High-fashion modest wear editorial photography, Saudi female model wearing {abaya_or_hijab_descriptor} — {fabric_type} fabric with {design_detail}, full modest coverage, elegant dignified posture, {setting_descriptor} — desert dunes at golden hour / marble interior / architectural doorway / neutral studio, professional fashion editorial lighting, {color_palette} color story, fabric drape and movement as primary visual element, faceless silhouette or three-quarter back angle preferred, or face fully visible with hijab fully covering hair, hyper-realistic fabric texture and drape, shot on 85mm at f/2.8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: exposed hair under hijab
Avoid in output: tight form-fitting clothing
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Saudi adaptation guidance: Abaya and hijab content is the dominant fashion category in Saudi Instagram. Silhouette-based editorial (faceless, from-behind, or three-quarter) is the safe default. If face shown, hijab must be completely correct. Saudi modest fashion is global-quality editorial — avoid looking low-budget or costume-like. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 3-5 per week for modest fashion brands. Compliance level: elevated.
